title: Cornetto
description: A modpack that optimizes the game without sacrificing the graphics
body:
![cornetto logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ab4e287dfca45a09176bd56819f47d3d1112fa3.png) ---
--- Cornetto (Italian: [kor' netto]; 'little horn') is a small modpack that strives to optimizes your game, with no extra knick-knacks attached to it, meaning you can just add any of your favourite mods on top of this modpack! This client side modpack (meaning you can join any server with it!) is meant for anyone who likes to keep things basic, or for the people who want to add other mods without having to deal with the optimization part. This pack doesn't add new features to it, like a zoom or no chat report function. (Though very unlikely, some servers don't allow login and chat packets to be altered.) Please keep in mind that this modpack may or may not work better than other modpacks on your system. This varies between systems as not every computer uses the exact same hardware. But since this modpack only uses a whopping 17 mods, it'll most likely work perfectly on your system too. What does Cornetto stand for?
OpenJDK Corretto > Cornetto - funny ice cream, hah, get it? Yeah, me neither. ---
What mods are included? Cornetto exists out of the following mods; * BadOptimizations - A collection of micro optimizations * Better Block Entities - Optimizes how block entities are rendered * Dynamic FPS - Reduces resource usage while Minecraft is in the background * Enchanted's Sodium Options - Makes the Sodium video settings screen look more like vanilla's. While purely cosmetical, this does not affect performance. * Entity Culling - Stops rendering entities that aren't on the screen * FerriteCore - Reduces memory usage * ImmediatelyFast - Optimizes mode rendering * kennytvs-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric - disables the world loading screen * MixinTrace - Makes crash logs easier to read * Model Gap Fix - Fixes item stitching * ModernFix - Fixes a lot of bugs and reduces memory usage * Moonrise - Optimises the integrated and dedicated server * More Culling - Introduces multiple culling methods to the game * Noisium - Optimises worldgen performance * Server Pinger Fixer - Improves how servers are pinged * Sodium - Improves how the game is rendered * StackDeobfuscator - Makes unreadable crash reports more readable
--- If you have encounter any bugs or issues, feel free to join my Discord to report them!
